title: Training-Free Proxy vs GBM-Probe JRN: Cross-Dataset Diagnostic Reliability on rel-stack and rel-avito
summary: Demo notebook analyzing training-free proxy reliability for estimating Join Reproduction Number (JRN) across two relational datasets (rel-stack, rel-avito). Loads 24 pre-computed (join, task) pair results containing GBM-probe JRN and 5 training-free proxies. Computes Spearman rank correlations, ROC-AUC for join selection, and cross-dataset consistency analysis. Visualizes proxy-JRN scatter plots, correlation bar charts, and JRN distributions. Key finding: mutual_information is the strongest proxy (pooled ρ=0.747), log_mean_fanout achieves best join-selection AUC (0.941).
